---
title: "Data Mining for Disaster Relief"
subtitle: "Classifying Blue Tarps in Post-Earthquake Haiti Satellite Imagery"
author: "Wyatt Scott"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 10
    fig_height: 6
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```
